transparent.title: Transparent
transparent.description: one price list, no hidden fees

weeklyPayouts.title: Weekly Payouts
weeklyPayouts.description: we send transfers on Monday by 12 PM and they are in your account the same day

support.title: Support 7 Days a Week
support.description: you can always count on us

seo.description: Looking for a trusted partner for Uber and Bolt drivers in Poland? Get RIDO offers simple settlements, weekly payouts and support 7 days a week. Choose a settlement model: 50 PLN + 8% tax or 159 PLN + 0% tax (with Get RIDO fuel card). Join Get RIDO and start earning more in Warsaw, Krakow and all over Poland.

pricing.title: Simple Settlement Models — Choose What Works for You
pricing.changeInfo: You choose the settlement model when signing the contract. You can change once a month. Payouts: once a week.
pricing.switchPartner: Can I switch from another partner?

simplePricing.title: Simple Settlement Models
simplePricing.subtitle: Choose the model that best suits your needs

howToStart.title: How to Join Get RIDO and Start Driving?

steps.title: Online Application
steps.description: fill out the form (name, phone, email, city, do you have a car)

steps.title: Documents
steps.description: send scans; we'll help you gather everything

steps.title: Verification and Signature
steps.description: electronic contract, no running around to offices

requirements.title: What Do You Need to Get Started?
requirements.noCarDesc: Let us know, we'll help you find a solution.

fuelCards.title: E100 Fuel Cards — Fuel Up Cheaper
fuelCards.subtitle: For Get RIDO drivers, we prepared E100 fuel cards with real discounts at selected stations.
fuelCards.discountInfo: Discounts in PLN gross per liter of fuel
fuelCards.requirementDesc: Access to the 159 PLN + 0% tax model requires an active E100 fuel card.

questions.question: When are the payouts?
questions.answer: We make payouts once a week (we plan daily payouts in the future).

questions.question: Are there any hidden fees?
questions.answer: No. You have transparent pricing and zero hidden costs.

questions.question: Do I need a business?
questions.answer: No. You drive through Get RIDO — we settle you as a partner.

questions.question: Can I switch from another partner?
questions.answer: Yes. We'll help you transfer settlements and activation within 24h.

questions.question: What documents are required?
questions.answer: Driver's license (min. 1 year), clean record (≤30 days), medical and psychotechnical tests, photo. Car with TAXI inspection (if required).

questions.question: Can I change the settlement model?
What is the Get RIDO fuel card?
questions.answer: It's a card with fuel discount at partner stations. It's required to use the 159 PLN + 0% tax model.

questions.question: Does Get RIDO help with formalities?
questions.answer: Yes — we'll guide you through the entire process, step by step.

contact.liveChatDesc: Use live chat - we answer 24/7! FAQ-bot responds immediately, and a consultant will join when you need.
